category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Brazil.

title.en: China-to-Brazil EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入巴西：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入巴西：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Brazil INMETRO compulsory certification, ABNT NBR IEC 61851, ABNT NBR IEC 62196 connector standards, ANEEL grid requirements, Anatel wireless homologation, and SISCOMEX import requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与巴西INMETRO强制认证、ABNT NBR IEC 61851、ABNT NBR IEC 62196连接器标准、ANEEL电网要求、Anatel无线认证及SISCOMEX进口要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與巴西INMETRO強制認證、ABNT NBR IEC 61851、ABNT NBR IEC 62196連接器標準、ANEEL電網要求、Anatel無線認證及SISCOMEX進口要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body assessment, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and installers should verify current Brazilian law, INMETRO regulations, ABNT standards, Anatel requirements, ANEEL grid connection rules, and SISCOMEX import procedures with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行巴西法律、INMETRO法规、ABNT标准、Anatel要求、ANEEL电网接入规则及SISCOMEX进口程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴西法律、INMETRO法規、ABNT標準、Anatel要求、ANEEL電網接入規則及SISCOMEX進口程序。

answer_first.en: Hardware connector replacement (GB/T → IEC 62196-2 Type 2 / CCS2), 60 Hz grid re-validation, and Portuguese labelling are confirmed Brazil-entry gaps for China-made EV chargers. A confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme specifically for EVSE could not be verified as of 2026-06-12 (framework actively evolving — verify portaria.inmetro.gov.br); ABNT NBR IEC 61851/62196 are the applicable standards. Anatel homologation applies conditionally — only if the charger integrates a wireless/radio module.
answer_first.zh: 连接器硬件替换（GB/T→IEC 62196-2 Type 2 / CCS2）、60Hz电网重新验证及葡萄牙语标签是中国制造充电桩进入巴西市场的已确认差距。截至2026年6月12日，专门针对EVSE的INMETRO强制认证方案未能得到确认（框架仍在积极演变——须在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核实）；ABNT NBR IEC 61851/62196为适用标准。Anatel型号认证为条件性要求——仅在充电设备集成无线/无线电模块时适用。
answer_first.zht: 連接器硬體替換（GB/T→IEC 62196-2 Type 2 / CCS2）、60Hz電網重新驗證及葡萄牙語標籤是中國製造充電樁進入巴西市場的已確認差距。截至2026年6月12日，專門針對EVSE的INMETRO強制認證方案未能得到確認（框架仍在積極演變——須在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核實）；ABNT NBR IEC 61851/62196為適用標準。Anatel型號認證為條件性要求——僅在充電設備集成無線/無線電模組時適用。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity assessment body, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
